style_guidelines.color_palette: Deep blacks (#000000 to #1d1d1f), pure white text, signature blue (#0071e3) or gradient accents
style_guidelines.typography: San Francisco Pro Display, extreme weight contrast (bold 80pt+ titles, light 24pt body), negative letter-spacing (-0.03em)
style_guidelines.imagery: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, dramatic lighting, product hero shots with reflections
style_guidelines.layout: Maximum negative space, single powerful image or statement per slide, content centered or dramatically offset
style_guidelines.effects: Subtle gradient overlays, light bloom and glow on key elements, reflection on surfaces
